name: Veal Fettuccini with Oysters and Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 C. cold water, added to oysters and set aside
3 veal cutlets (very thin, cut into 1/4-inch julienne strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasoning mix.
2. Add slices of veal and toss.
3. In a large nonstick skillet, melt 1 stick butter.
4. Cook veal quickly, about 5 minutes.
5. Quarter the artichoke hearts.
6. Add artichokes, green onions, and the rest of the flour mix to the veal.
7. Add 3 tablespoons more butter.
8. Cook for 2 minutes.
9. Stir in 1/4 cup oyster water.
10. Cook for 1 minute.
11. Add the remaining oyster water and 4 tablespoons butter, then evaporated milk.
12. Cook about 3 minutes, stirring lightly.
13. Add the oysters and 4 tablespoons butter until melted.
14. Cook for about 5 minutes to cook the oysters.
15. Add cooked noodles.
16. Turn off the burner and set aside for 5 minutes.
17. To serve, roll the pasta and arrange oysters and veal on each serving.
